title: ERASMUS+ ÖĞRENİM ve STAJ HAREKETLİLİĞİ (2020-1-TR01-KA103-084589 Numaralı Proje) 08.02.2022 Tarihli Yazılı Dil Sınavı Önemli Bilgilendirme
content:
Duyurular

Detay

Sevgili Öğrenciler,

Çevirimiçi – Microsoft Teams

[email protected]

Başarılar dileriz.

Dear Students,

ERASMUS+ Written Exam with Project number 2020-1-TR01-KA103-084589 will be administered on Dudullu campus on Tuesday, February 8, 2022.

ERASMUS+ Speaking part of the Exam will be administered online on Thursday, February 10, 2022 on MS Teams.

The exam consists of two parts and the students are required to attend both parts.

08.02.2022 Written Exam (75%): 10:00 - 11:15 (Duration: 75 minutes)

10.02.2022 Speaking Exam (25%): 09:00 – 14:50 (Duration: max 10 minutes for each student)

The face to face Written Exam will be administered at 10:00 on Dudullu campus.

All students must take the written exam in classrooms, where they were placed, on Dudullu campus at 10:00 on February 8, 2022. Students must have a valid ID with photo (student ID card, passport, driver's license), a blue pen, a pencil and an eraser during the exam.

For the Speaking Exam, check Erasmus+ Speaking Exam Appointment Lists that will be announced on the university’s website on February 9, 2022. You need to be online on MS Teams within the slot you were allotted to. Be ready and wait for the examiner’s call on MS Teams anytime during the specified slot which is written next to your student number on the speaking exam appointment lists. Students who have problems with their computers can also take the exam on their mobile phones by downloading MS Teams application on their mobile phones. To summarize, be online on MS Teams within the given time and wait for the examiner’s call.

[email protected]

Good Luck!

Paylaş
